original_text:
### Charts & Infographics
- Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
- **Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
- Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
- Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
- Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
- Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

relations.note: The print font selection co-applies with the shared chart headline casing, color, and rule treatment.
The email font and weight selection co-applies with the shared chart headline casing, color, and rule treatment.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Keep data displays consistent, approachable, and readily scannable.
rules.rule_text: Charts and infographics use a clean, easy-to-scan container: a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) rounded panel with a rounded Brand Blue (#00529b) header bar. Bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes, including rounded bar tops.

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
**Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Create a disciplined data hierarchy and distinguish comparator data.
rules.rule_text: In charts and infographics, Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant. Reserve Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) for emphasis on key figures or data points only; render placebo/comparator data in neutral gray.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart titles a consistent branded hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are ALL CAPS in Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule beneath.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Apply the specified print chart headline face.
rules.rule_text: In print charts, headlines use Agenda.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Apply the specified email chart headline treatment.
rules.rule_text: In email charts, headlines use Nunito Sans in Bold or heavier weight.

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Prioritize the key statistic while keeping supporting and reference information legible.
rules.rule_text: In chart statistical callouts, make the percentage figure large and bold as the hero, with supporting copy beneath in a lighter weight. Make footnotes noticeably smaller and clearly separated from primary data.
